mapper.select: SELECT config_key AS configKey, CAST(config_value AS CHAR) AS configValue, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM system_config ORDER BY config_key
SELECT config_key AS configKey, CAST(config_value AS CHAR) AS configValue, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_config (config_key, config_value, updated_at) VALUES (#{configKey}, CAST(#{configValue} AS JSON), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = CAST(#{configValue} AS JSON), updated_at = NOW()
